title: Access to electricity is lower in rural areas
subtitle: People with access to electricity, by place of residence (% of population)
source: World Bank Group. “Access to electricity, rural (% of rural population),” “Access to electricity, urban (% of urban population).” SDG 7.1.1 Electrification Dataset.
visdescription: Line charts showing the difference in access to electricity between urban and rural areas in different regions and the world.
